description: Log in to FreeMED (http://localhost/freemed/) using username 'admin' and password 'admin'. Add an administrative chart note to the patient 'David Chen' with the subject 'Accommodations - Interpreter Required'. The note body must contain the following text: "Patient is profoundly deaf. A certified ASL (American Sign Language) interpreter MUST be scheduled and present for all clinical encounters. Please contact the contracted interpreter services agency at least 48 hours prior to any scheduled appointment. Patient's preferred contact method for scheduling is text message or secure patient portal, do NOT call the home phone."

metadata.target_text_snippet: certified ASL (American Sign Language) interpreter MUST be scheduled
